title: UAE unveils Dh6-billion transport masterplan to cut Dubai–Sharjah–Ajman traffic chaos
summary_full: Commuters between Dubai, Sharjah, and Ajman will soon experience significant relief. A massive Dh6 billion highway project and a new Bus Rapid Transit system are set to transform travel. These initiatives aim to reduce traffic jams and offer faster public transport. The plan focuses on smarter mobility, not just more roads.
